summary: Per-item GST in Sale Voucher - All 9 backend tests passed, all frontend UI tests passed. CGST+SGST, IGST, No GST calculations working correctly. Buyer GSTIN/Address fields conditionally shown. GST Invoice tab removed from Vouchers page. Deduction fields (Cash, Diesel, Advance) intact.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: POST /api/sale-book with gst_type=cgst_sgst correctly splits GST 50/50 into CGST and SGST
VERIFIED: POST /api/sale-book with gst_type=igst correctly assigns full GST to IGST
VERIFIED: POST /api/sale-book with gst_type=none correctly sets all GST amounts to 0
VERIFIED: Per-item GST fields (hsn_code, gst_percent, gst_amount) saved and returned in response
VERIFIED: buyer_gstin and buyer_address fields saved and returned correctly
VERIFIED: PUT /api/sale-book/{id} correctly recalculates per-item GST on update
VERIFIED: GET /api/sale-book/{id}/pdf generates valid PDF for GST vouchers
VERIFIED: GET /api/gst-invoices returns 404 (standalone GST Invoice routes removed)
VERIFIED: Frontend Vouchers page has NO GST Invoice tab (tabs: sale, purchase, paddy, stock, summary)
VERIFIED: Frontend Sale Voucher form shows GST% column only when gst_type != 'none'
VERIFIED: Frontend Buyer GSTIN and Buyer Address fields appear only when GST is enabled
VERIFIED: Frontend deduction fields (Cash Truck ko, Diesel Pump se, Advance Party se mila) still functional
VERIFIED: Frontend HSN column always visible in items table
seed_data_creation: Test vouchers created and cleaned up during pytest execution
context_for_next_testing_agent: Per-item GST in Sale Voucher fully implemented and tested. Backend: _compute_sale_gst helper calculates per-item GST based on gst_type (cgst_sgst, igst, none). Frontend: SaleBook.jsx shows HSN/GST% columns conditionally, Buyer GSTIN/Address fields appear when GST enabled. Standalone GST Invoice feature removed (gst_invoice.py, GstInvoice.jsx deleted). All deduction fields (cash_paid, diesel_paid, advance) working.

sale_voucher_cgst_sgst.details: CGST+SGST split 50/50 correctly (e.g., 5% GST = 2.5% CGST + 2.5% SGST)

sale_voucher_igst.details: IGST calculation correct (full GST goes to IGST, CGST/SGST = 0)

sale_voucher_no_gst.details: No GST calculation correct (all GST amounts = 0 even if gst_percent set)

per_item_gst_fields.details: hsn_code, gst_percent, gst_amount saved and returned per item

buyer_gstin_address.details: buyer_gstin and buyer_address saved and returned correctly

sale_voucher_delete.details: DELETE removes voucher and related entries

sale_voucher_pdf.details: PDF generation returns valid PDF with GST details

frontend_gst_invoice_tab_removed.details: Vouchers page has no GST Invoice tab

frontend_gst_columns_conditional.details: GST% column shown only when gst_type != 'none'

frontend_buyer_fields_conditional.details: Buyer GSTIN/Address shown only when GST enabled

frontend_deduction_fields.details: Cash, Diesel, Advance fields all functional
